title: Staff Software Engineer, Stream Compute
description: You'll help define and deliver the next generation of Stripe's Flink-first stream compute infrastructure—driving innovation to meet extremely high availability targets at global scale. Partnering with infrastructure engineers, adjacent platform teams, and the product orgs that depend on Flink every day, you'll set a long-term technical direction that scales with Stripe's growth while enabling reliable, efficient operations for years to come. You'll work on the hardest problems in operating Flink in production—state management, exactly-once processing, performance isolation, and automated recovery—so teams across Stripe can confidently build stateful stream processing applications on top of it.
responsibilities: Design, build, and operate stream compute infrastructure centered around Apache Flink with Kafka, Temporal, and AWS services
Partner with product and platform teams to gather requirements, unblock Flink adoption, and improve end-to-end stream processing usage
Define and implement operational best practices such as shuffle sharding, cellular architecture, load shedding, and automated state recovery
Drive fleet-level automation and standardization by transitioning from manual systems to self-service workflows and self-healing infrastructure
Lead initiatives to improve Flink availability and state durability through multi-region strategies, disaster recovery readiness, and incident learning
Evaluate and productionize Flink ecosystem capabilities including SQL, connectors, and state backends
Collaborate with the open source community to adopt new features and contribute back to open source projects
requirements: 10+ years of experience building and operating large-scale production systems (Staff-level)
Experience as a technical lead on distributed systems teams in fast-moving environments
Hands-on experience with big data technologies such as Flink, Spark, Kafka, Pulsar, or Pinot
Experience developing, maintaining, and debugging distributed systems using open source tools
Experience building and scaling infrastructure as a product
Strong software engineering skills and ability to write high-quality code (Go, Java, Scala, etc)
Comfortable operating with high autonomy and ownership
Growth mindset with ability to learn quickly and navigate ambiguous problem spaces
Strong written and verbal communication skills, including technical documentation

title: Senior Staff Software Engineer, Developer Infrastructure
description: Lead the evolution of Stripe’s developer infrastructure to improve engineering productivity at scale. Define architectural strategies, influence engineering practices across the company, and partner with product and infrastructure teams to solve developer pain points. Drive initiatives around observability, reliability, and AI-powered development workflows to enhance productivity and system performance.
responsibilities: Define long-term architectural strategies, policies, and abstractions for developer infrastructure
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to improve developer workflows and productivity
Lead and mentor engineers, providing technical guidance and support
Drive company-wide initiatives to measure and improve engineering productivity
Implement AI-driven development strategies such as coding assistants and agentic workflows
Navigate organizational complexity and support high-impact engineering initiatives
requirements: BS or MS in Computer Science or related field
13+ years of experience in software development or DevOps
Experience building developer tooling such as CI/CD, code review, build systems, or IDEs
Experience leading large-scale, cross-team engineering projects
Strong experience with distributed systems reliability and security
Experience mentoring engineers across different levels
Experience debugging and maintaining distributed systems
Strong understanding of operational excellence including metrics, alerts, and dashboards

title: Software Engineer - Smart Contract, Bridge
description: Build blockchain-based payment infrastructure powered by stablecoins to enable faster, cheaper global money movement. Work on multi-chain systems, smart contracts, and protocols that support borderless financial access. Operate in a highly autonomous, early-stage environment with ownership over greenfield projects and core platform architecture.

Develop smart contracts to increase transaction throughput
Design platforms for issuing stablecoins across multiple blockchains
Create monitoring systems to detect anomalous blockchain activity
Design and build blockchain applications and protocols for payments
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to translate business needs into technical solutions
Implement, test, and debug smart contracts with a focus on security and efficiency
Optimize blockchain performance and scalability
Contribute to overall system architecture and design
Stay current with blockchain advancements and integrate new technologies
requirements: BS or MS in Computer Science, Engineering, or related field
5+ years of software engineering experience
Strong experience with blockchain platforms such as Ethereum or Solana
Experience developing smart contracts using Solidity or similar languages
Deep understanding of cryptography and blockchain protocols
Experience with DeFi and stablecoins is highly desirable
Knowledge of blockchain security best practices
Strong ownership mindset and ability to influence product direction
Ability to work in fast-paced, ambiguous environments
Strong written and verbal communication skills

title: Software Engineer, Bridge

Work on highly reliable backend systems that help businesses send, receive, store, and disburse money globally using stablecoin rails. Contribute to mission-critical infrastructure used by developers globally

Experience building backend systems with SQL databases

Ability to thrive in a fast-paced environment
Ability to write maintainable, well-tested, modular code while moving quickly

Strong written and verbal communication skills, including technical documentation
Interest or experience in crypto, financial products, API products, blockchain, or distributed systems is a plus
